title: Trezor adds native USDt, USDC yield via Morpho integration
summary: The feature lets users earn stablecoin yield directly through Trezor Suite without connecting external wallets or using separate DeFi apps.

title: French company abandons crypto treasury strategy, will liquidate Bitcoin holdings
summary: In the year since Sequans Communications announced that it would adopt a digital asset treasury strategy, the price of Bitcoin fell by more than 30%.

title: Treasuries Rise as Optimism for US-Iran Deal Trims Oil Prices
summary: Treasuries rose after reports that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a truce and work toward ending a three-month war that’s ignited an oil-driven surge in inflation.

title: Gold Rises as Reports of US-Iran Deal Eases Bets on Higher Rates
summary: Gold rose after reports that Iran and the US reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war, pending final approval from US President Donald Trump.

title: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
summary: Rendered illustrations published ahead of WWDC 2026 reveal a dedicated Siri app, Dynamic Island integration, and a Google Gemini backbone—the biggest overhaul to the assistant in nearly 15 years.

title: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
summary: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.

title: The Digital Chamber ramps up pressure on Congress with call to action to pass Clarity Act
summary: The Digital Chamber published a website to serve as a central spot for people to write to lawmakers in its latest push to pass a crypto bill.

title: Kalshi’s turn: Prediction markets platform sues Minnesota over law going into effect in August
summary: Following the CFTC's suit, Kalshi has sued the state of Minnesota after Governor Tim Walz signed a law blocking prediction markets.
